/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/analysis_xml.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/coord_trans.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/dec2bin.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/dongtaicunchu.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/ici.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/imm.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/interfere.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/jiema.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/kalman.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/matrix.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/matrix2.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/mysql_db.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/mystring.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/peizhun_while_dabao.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/pinghua.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/server_1112.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/time_registration.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/tool.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/unit_conversion.c.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/weight_fusion.c.o -o /home/lrd/C_C++_programs/20_test/project/server/bin/server  -lm -lmysqlclient
